summary: Plan-only inventory triage over the hydrated PR shard. No merge recommendations were safe because no candidate had a complete merge preflight with Codex /review evidence, and no cluster-scoped executable fix artifact was complete. #80455 and #80947 are the surviving PR paths in their families, #79853 and #79985 should stay open as independent maintainer-review candidates, #82514 needs a maintainer decision because the partial UI i18n branch is broad and failing core checks, #46217 and #80435 stay open alongside their linked PRs, and #53550 is quarantined with route_security.
